title: Tell Me, Show Me, Let Me See You
sacredRules: Before we begin, my love, these are our unbreakable rules. One: if you choose 'Other,' your honesty is the most precious gift. I will kiss you for it, never judge it. Two: a fantasy spoken here is not a promise to perform it. This is our map of desire, not a contract. Three: if a card feels too heavy, just say 'Skip,' and we move on instantly, no explanation needed. Four: after each night's game, we hold each other in silence for ten minutes. No analyzing. Just our heartbeats. Ready? Let me see you.

days.title: The Salsa Bar
days.setting: We're at a lively Latin bar. The music is loud, the drinks are flowing, and the dance floor is thick with bodies and heat. We're both dancing, but not always with each other.

The dance is becoming pure seduction. How far are you willing to let him go right there on the dance floor? And what do you want from me while this happens?

options.A: Just the close dance. His hands can hold my hips, pull me close, but nothing more than what the dance allows. I want you to watch from the bar, calm and confident.
options.B: His hands can roam more - my ass, my waist, pulling me tight against him so I feel him. I want to catch your eye and see a knowing smirk.
options.C: I'd let him kiss my neck on the dance floor, maybe a brief kiss on the mouth. I want you to see it and not flinch.

cards.title: The Girl Dancing with Me - How Far & Her Reaction
cards.question: Now the tables turn. A beautiful woman asks me to dance. She's flirtatious, touching my chest, my arms, pressing close. How far are you willing to let her go with me?

options.A: She can dance with you, touch your arms, your chest. That's it. When the song ends, come back to me.

options.C: I let it play out fully. I want to see how far she'll go and how you handle it. I enjoy seeing you desired.

cards.title: The Guy Suggests Sex - Her Reaction & My Role

cards.title: The Girl Suggests Sex with Me - My Reaction & Her Role
cards.question: The woman I was dancing with leans in and suggests she wants me. She's bold and direct. What do you want my reaction to be?

options.B: I want you to keep her waiting. Come to me first. Let me decide. I might say tell her to leave or let's see where this goes.

days.title: The Masquerade
days.setting: An elegant, decadent masked party. Chandeliers, gowns, suits, and total anonymity. Everyone is someone else tonight. The masks hide identities but reveal desires.

cards.title: How We Enter - Our Game Plan
cards.question: We're dressed, masked, and standing outside the venue. How do you want us to enter this party?

options.A: Arm in arm, clearly a couple. We mingle together and always return to each other. United and powerful.
options.B: Complete strangers for the whole night. We arrive separately, don't acknowledge each other, and meet at home to confess.
options.C: Strangers at the beginning, lovers at the end. At midnight, you find me and seduce me like a stranger.

cards.title: The Other Couple - The Invitation
cards.question: We meet another masked couple. The chemistry is undeniable. They suggest we continue somewhere more private. Would you accept?

options.B: I'd accept being on the same bed, all four of us, but no swapping. Penetration is ours alone.
options.C: I'd accept a soft swap. Touching, kissing, oral with others, but sex stays between us.

cards.title: Going Home with Another Man - Her Fantasy
cards.question: A masked man asks you to leave with him. Just for one night. No names, no history, just experience. Does that fantasy exist in you?

options.A: No. The thrill of the stranger is exciting, but going home alone crosses a line. I want you at the end of every night.
options.B: The fantasy exists in my mind, but I wouldn't do it. I'd rather you roleplay the stranger instead.

cards.question: A masked woman asks me to leave with her. Would you ever be willing to let me go? Even just once?

days.title: The Third Person
days.setting: We're back in our private space. The fantasies from the previous days are still burning. Now we explore what happens when we add a third person into our bed.

cards.question: There's another man in the room. He's here for you. What do you want to happen between you and him?

cards.title: Another Woman - My Role
cards.question: Now there's another woman in the room. She's here for me. How far should I go with her?

options.B: You can go further - oral, touching everywhere - but no penetration. That's reserved for me.

cards.question: In this scenario with another woman, what is your role?

days.title: The Final Day
days.setting: The journey is ending. We've mapped our desires. Now we decide what we carry home.

cards.title: The Next Step - Her Deepest Wish
cards.question: We've explored so much. Now, looking forward, what do you truly want? The choice is entirely yours.

options.A: I want to repeat one of my fantasies again.
options.B: I want us to come up with a brand new fantasy together.
options.C: I want to repeat one of your fantasies again. This is my gift to you.

cards.title: The Romantic Night - If She Chose D
cards.question: A romantic night, just us. Tell me what your perfect version looks like.

options.A: A surprise. You plan every detail. Show me you know my heart without me saying a word.
options.B: Simple and nostalgic. A calm and elegant night out.
options.C: Decadent and slow. A rooftop dinner under stars, slow dancing, let romance build for hours.
options.D: Just us, no plans. Room service, no clothes, no phones. A cocoon of just you and me.
